headers.value: noindex, nofollow, noarchive, nosnippet, noimageindex, notranslate

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://ims-20-railway-production.up.railway.app; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
